Petition Of Beneficiary To Determine Validity Of The Trust, Modify Irrevocable Trus, And Instruct Trustee To Correct Title Assets
Off Calendar Aug-19-2020 Continued To Oct-14-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances Meredith Bushnell appeared by zoom for Ashton Finegold (Petitioner).

Ms. Bushnell presented oral argument to support her position as to why notice does not need to be given to Wendy Tonkin's children. Upon conclusion of argument, the Petition to Determine Validity of Trust, etc. is continued to October 14, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for notice to be provided.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: C. Cabasares. Not reported.
